title: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Universal Forwarder - February 2026
description: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk Universal Forwarder - February 2026
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Universal Forwarder to versions 10.0.3, 9.4.8, 9.3.9, 9.2.12, or higher.
